cdp_names.CDP1: Based on Progressive Change least-cost DP
cdp_names.CDP2: Based on Step Change least-cost DP (Progressive Change least-cost with actionable ML and VNI West)
cdp_names.CDP3: Based on Hydrogen Superpower least-cost DP
cdp_names.CDP4: Based on Slow Change least-cost DP (Progressive Change without actionable Sydney Ring)
cdp_names.CDP5: Progressive Change least-cost DP, with Marinus Link actionable
cdp_names.CDP6: Progressive Change, with VNI West actionable
cdp_names.CDP7: Progressive Change, without New England REZ Transmission Link actionable
cdp_names.CDP10: Progressive Change least-cost DP, with actionable Marinus Link and VNI West staged
cdp_names.CDP11: Progressive Change least-cost DP, with actionable Marinus Link, VNI West staged, and actionable HumeLink
cdp_names.CDP12: Progressive Change least-cost DP, with actionable Marinus Link, and staged VNI West and HumeLink
cdp_names.CDP13: Progressive Change least-cost DP with staged VNI West and HumeLink, but with Marinus Link not available
cdp_names.Counterfactual: No future network augmentation other than committed and anticipated projects/ small intra-regional augmentations/ replacement expenditure projects
